member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.CompositionCommand
member.summary: Implements the 'composition' command to show type composition

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.ExamplesCommand
member.summary: Implements the 'examples' command to retrieve usage examples for types

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.HierarchyCommand
member.summary: Implements the 'hierarchy' command to show inheritance relationships

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.ListCommand
member.summary: Implements the 'list' command to list all available types

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.ListCommand.IsAbstractType(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Checks if a type is abstract

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.ListCommand.GetDisplayName(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Gets the display name (title) from a schema

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.ListCommand.SortTypes(System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.TypeInfo},System.String)
member.summary: Sorts the type list based on the specified field

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.TypeInfo
member.summary: Type information for list output

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SchemaCommand
member.summary: Implements the 'schema' command to retrieve type definitions

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SchemaCommand.ExecuteGetAllDefinitions(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema,Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Returns all type definitions

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SchemaCommand.MergeBaseProperties(System.String,Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema,Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer)
member.summary: Merges properties from base classes into the type definition

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SchemaCommand.CloneJsonSchema(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Deep clones a JsonSchema object using JSON serialization

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SchemaCommand.CollectReferencedDefinitions(System.String,Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema,Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.SchemaIndexer,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Collects all referenced definitions and adds them to x-referenced-definitions
Recursively collects all type references from a schema
Collects references from a property schema
Adds a referenced type and all its derived types if abstract

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SchemaCommand.IsAbstractType(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Checks if a type is abstract by looking for x-abstract property

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SchemaCommand.ExtractTypeNameFromRef(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts type name from a $ref string (e.g., "#/definitions/SendActivity" -> "SendActivity")

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SearchCommand
member.summary: Implements the 'search' command to search for types by name pattern

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SearchCommand.ConvertWildcardToRegex(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a wildcard pattern (*, ?) to a regex pattern

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SearchCommand.IsAbstractType(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Checks if a type is abstract

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SearchCommand.GetDisplayName(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Gets the display name (title) from a schema

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SearchCommand.GetDescription(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Gets the description from a schema

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SearchCommand.GetKind(Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Gets the kind value from a schema

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.SearchResult
member.summary: Search result information

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Commands.ValidateCommand
member.summary: Implements the 'validate' command to validate YAML content against the schema

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.CompositionTreeFormatter
member.summary: Formats composition information as an ASCII tree

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.CompositionTreeFormatter.Format(Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.CompositionInfo)
member.summary: Formats composition info as an ASCII tree

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.CompositionTreeFormatter.FormatProperty(Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.PropertyInfo,System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Formats a property and its nested properties

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.CompositionTreeFormatter.ExtractBaseTypeName(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the base type name from a type string (removes [] suffix)

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.InheritanceTreeFormatter
member.summary: Formats hierarchy information as an ASCII inheritance tree

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.InheritanceTreeFormatter.Format(Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyInfo,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Formats a hierarchy as an ASCII tree

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.InheritanceTreeFormatter.BuildDescendantTree(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Services.HierarchyNode},System.Text.StringBuilder,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Recursively builds the descendant tree

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.JsonFormatter
member.summary: Formats output as JSON with optional indentation

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.JsonIgnoreTypeInspector
member.summary: Type inspector that respects [JsonIgnore] attributes from System.Text.Json

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.Formatters.YamlFormatter
member.summary: Formats output as YAML

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Cli.TestSchemaRepository
member.summary: Test class to demonstrate that SchemaRepository is generated at build time
